description.title: Book contents
description.subtitle: Two comprehensive books to master and know everything about blood sampling, biochemical, haematological and serological analysis techniques — 100% practical — and materials and tools used in medical analysis laboratories

book1.title: Book 1 — Laboratory materials and tools
items: Complete guide to laboratory equipment and tools
Overview of automated systems (FNS, Ionogram, Biochemistry, etc.)
How to use equipment (spectrophotometer, centrifuge, water bath, etc.)
Mastering pipettes, counting cells (Malassez, Nageotte), and tubes
Real illustrations and high-quality color photos

book2.title: Book 2 — Practical guide to medical biology analysis techniques
items: Over 110 detailed dosage techniques and analyses
Blood collection techniques and selection of anticoagulants
Complete Blood Count (FNS Hémogramme) and blood smears
Comprehensive biochemistry assays (Glucose, HGPO, Urea, Creatinine, Cholesterol, etc.)
Immunological analyses, rapid strip tests, and ELISA methods
Serological exams (Toxoplasmosis, Rubella, Hepatitis, HIV, Syphilis, etc.)

description.promo: Don't just stick to theory, put it into practice! The Akou Series is your reference to master medical analyses, blood sampling, and laboratory equipment. Boost your skills and gain experience now!

These books are designed for students in biology, biochemistry, pharmacy, medicine, paramedical, chemistry, immunology, virology, genetics and SNV.
